title: Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: The process of inferring the reward function from an expert's demonstrations. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Q-Learning. It opens into AI in Inverse Reinforcement Learning and Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL).
